orderCreated.title: Order Created
orderCreated.description: Your cross-chain order has been successfully created and is now processing.

rate.title: Exchange rate
rate.staleTitle: Price data is stale (15–60s old). A background refresh is in progress.
rate.fallbackTitle: The relayer price feed is unreachable; this is a hardcoded estimate.
rate.staleWarning: Prices refreshing in background — quote is from up to 60s ago and is still safe to use.
rate.fallbackWarning: Live price feed unreachable. Final swap amount will use the relayer's price at execution time and may differ.

errors.networkSwitchFailed: Please switch MetaMask to {{network}} manually and try again.
errors.txFailed: Transaction failed. Please check your balance and try again.
errors.txInsufficientFunds: Insufficient funds for gas * price + value
errors.stellarRejected: Stellar transaction was rejected by user

history.title: Transaction History
history.subtitle: Track your cross-chain swaps between Ethereum and Stellar networks
history.refreshing: Showing cached history while refreshing latest data...

empty.title: No transactions yet
empty.subtitle: Your real cross-chain swaps will appear here after the first transaction

refund.ethTitle: Refund your locked ETH from the HTLC contract once the timelock expires
refund.xlmTitle: Ask the relayer to refund your original XLM payment
refund.refundSettled: Refund settled on {{network}}. Click to view the refund transaction.
refund.refundRequires: Manual refund requires the original Stellar transaction and your Stellar wallet address.

networks.mainnetSoonTitle: v2 mainnet launches after independent audit (Q1 2027)

metamask.name: MetaMask
metamask.hint: Install MetaMask from metamask.io and reload the page.

freighter.name: Freighter
freighter.hint: Install Freighter from the Chrome Web Store and reload the page.

errors.metamaskConnectHintRejected: You rejected the connection request in MetaMask.
errors.metamaskConnectHintGeneral: Check the MetaMask popup and try again.
errors.metamaskReloadHint: Refresh the page. If accounts are locked, unlock MetaMask and try again.
errors.freighterUnavailable: Freighter API not available. Is the extension installed?
errors.freighterUnavailableHint: Install Freighter from the Chrome Web Store and reload the page.

toast.networkChangeCancelledBody: You declined the wallet switch — app is still on {{network}}.
toast.networkSwitchFailedBody: Please switch your wallet network manually, then click the toggle again.

mismatch.title: Your wallet network does not match the app network.
mismatch.freighterHint: Switch Freighter to Stellar Testnet in the extension if needed.
mismatch.signingWillFail: Balances and signing will fail until they match.

mainnetBanner.title: Mainnet: v1 single-relayer bridge active
mainnetBanner.body: v2 decentralized HTLC stack (multi-resolver, on-chain hashlock/timelock) is live on testnet. v2 mainnet launch is on the roadmap for Q1 2027 after audit. Switch to testnet to try the v2 flow today.

refundDialog.title: Refund order
refundDialog.subtitle: Refund is permissionless — your wallet calls the contract directly.
refundDialog.ready: The timelock has expired. You can refund this order at any time.

error.title: Refund failed
error.networkMismatch: Wallet connected to {{walletNetwork}} while app is in {{appMode}} mode. Switch networks to continue.
error.invalidOrderId: v1 mainnet refund requires a 0x-prefixed bytes32 order id.
error.htlcNotConfigured: HTLCEscrow address is not configured for this network. v2 is testnet-only; switch to testnet to refund.

claimDialog.title: Claim order
claimDialog.subtitle: Direct on-chain claim — your wallet calls the contract directly.

coordinatorUp.title: Coordinator is available
coordinatorUp.body: Use the standard claim flow — the coordinator will relay the secret to the destination chain automatically.

fallback.title: Coordinator unavailable — fallback mode
fallback.body: The coordinator is offline. You can still claim your funds by submitting the secret directly to the on-chain contract from your wallet.

error.title: Claim failed
error.networkMismatch: Wallet is on the wrong network for {{mode}} mode. Switch networks to continue.
error.htlcNotConfigured: HTLCEscrow address is not configured for this network. v2 is testnet-only — switch to testnet to claim.

button.notNeeded: Fallback is not needed while the coordinator is reachable.

stellar.memoNotAccepted: Stellar memo IDs are not accepted here. Paste the account address starting with G.
stellar.invalid: Enter a valid Stellar public address (starts with G, 56 chars).

solana.invalid: Enter a valid Solana wallet address.

amount.tooLow: Amount must be greater than zero.
amount.tooManyDecimals: Amount may have at most {{maxDecimals}} decimals for this token.

destination.mustBeEthereum: Destination must be an Ethereum address for this route.
destination.mustBeStellar: Destination must be a Stellar address for this route.
destination.mustBeSolana: Destination must be a Solana address for this route.
